hooks.command: echo 'RESUME (contradictionchecker, as of 2026-06-02). MAJOR STATE since the prior note: (A) ADR-0017 UI collapse is COMPLETE (Phases 1-6, PRs #74-78 and #81). The single-page corpora+findings UI is now the DEFAULT: GET / serves it; ?legacy=1 and all /tabs/* return 410; the legacy 7-tab templates are deleted. UI = cc_single.html shell + cc_sidebar/cc_findings/cc_drawer + cc_new_corpus_modal/cc_new_run_modal + cc__* partials; drawer bodies reuse cc_assertions/cc_definitions/cc_stats.html. (B) Security hardening merged (PR #79): serve REFUSES a non-loopback --host unless --unsafe-no-auth is passed; background-run failures store a generic message (no raw exception text in the UI); /corpora/new derives the corpus path from a uuid id, not the raw name; uploads capped at 100 MB/file + 100 files + 500 MB/request; POST /verdicts validates pair_key shape. (C) Cleanup sweep merged (#82/#83/#84): deleted the dead REST layer web/api/corpora.py AND web/api/runs.py + the consistency_checker.models package + dead symbols + empty stub-loader machinery; pruned dead CSS (cc_style.css 675 to 376 lines, added .cc-button--ghost); shipped findings CSV export at GET /corpora/{id}/findings.csv (Export button in the findings header, honors the active filter). (D) PyPI release setup IS IN FLIGHT on branch chore/pypi-release-setup (commit a00dff7, NOT yet pushed or merged): polished pyproject (SPDX Apache-2.0, classifiers, urls), .github/workflows/release.yml (PyPI Trusted Publishing via OIDC on a published GitHub Release, plus a TestPyPI workflow_dispatch dry-run), README pipx line, docs/RELEASING.md. Package name consistency-checker is AVAILABLE on PyPI. NEXT STEP needs the operator: do the one-time PyPI Trusted-Publisher web setup (PyPI project consistency-checker, Owner toddaerickson, Repository contradictionchecker, Workflow release.yml, Environment blank) per docs/RELEASING.md, then merge the PR and cut a GitHub Release to publish. STANDING FACTS: judge/extractor default to Moonshot/Kimi (kimi-k2.6); needs MOONSHOT_API_KEY in a gitignored .env; run from repo root. --corpus is REQUIRED on ingest/check/estimate-cost/export. Pairwise is opt-in (--pairwise, default OFF, ADR-0015); the definition-inconsistency detector is the default lever. First check --pairwise downloads ~440 MB DeBERTa; default check does NOT. OCR fallback is automatic for image PDFs (--no-ocr to disable, ADR-0014). License is Apache-2.0. REMAINING COMMERCIAL BLOCKERS: (1) finish the PyPI release (operator manual step above), and (2) publish real precision/recall for the DEFAULT definition detector, which needs a labeled eval set (no ground truth exists yet). Full background and provenance in MEMORY.md.'
